sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48342" key="qeofi/lhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεοφίλ-ητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48342.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loved by the gods</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phint.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23.61a</biblScope> </bibl> (hyperdor. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ᾱτος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
